No higher scores are warranted based on the content.\n\n5. **Malware Score Reflection:**\n   - All reports correctly assign a malware score of 0.\n   - The code does not contain any malicious payloads, backdoors, or suspicious behaviors.\n\n6. **Claims Based on Assumptions:**\n   -
